not_table_based: Only table-based orders can be moved
cannot_merge_self: Cannot merge an order into itself
merge_must_be_active: Only ACTIVE orders can be merged
merge_source_has_payments: Cannot merge a source order that has payments recorded
merge_target_has_payments: Cannot merge onto a target order that has payments recorded
merge_no_active_items: Source order has no active items to merge
split_empty: Split produced an empty order — no items were moved
cannot_add_items: Cannot add items to an order in {state} state
exceeds_balance: Payment amount {amount} exceeds remaining balance of {balance}
use_remove_coupon: Use the remove-coupon endpoint to clear a coupon
coupon_limit_per_customer: Coupon usage limit per customer reached
